kept.text:
Time to time, the downstream effects of every major emerging sector in DeFi have always been amplified through @pendle_fi.

With V2 yield tokenisation enabling:

🔹 Yield discovery via YT trading
🔹 A foundational fixed-yield primitive through PTs → forming the basis for layered DeFi strategies

The core value proposition and playbook have remained  consistent.

And that consistency is precisely why Pendle continues to command such a strong market dominance moat.

So now you ask, why Pendle?

The answer is more than obvious. It financialises yield to it's most expressive form that creates an incredibly powerful flywheel:

1⃣New yield sectors emerge
2⃣Pendle becomes the discovery + financialisation venue
3⃣ liquidity deepens
4⃣ integrations expand
5⃣ more strategies become possible
6⃣ more capital flows back into Pendle (repeat)

This is The Pendle Effect.

Pendle

profile_bio.description: part-time yapper; janitor @mementoresearch; prev @pendle_fi SWE

kept.text:
Peptoma Top Contributor Challenge Season 1 is LIVE 🏆

We’ve added 20,000,000 $PEPTM into the rewards pool.
7 days. Proportional distribution. Every contribution counts.

How to earn your share:

🧪 Submit a peptide sequence to The Lab → +10 pts
💬 Annotate a discovery (confirm / challenge / extend / tag) → +15 pts

The more you contribute relative to everyone else, the bigger your slice of the pool.

Reward formula:
Your reward = (your score / total score of all participants) × 20,000,000 $PEPTM

No fixed winner. No cutoff. Every participant who contributes gets rewarded.

Event window: May 6 – May 13, 2026
Leaderboard updates every 10 seconds live at https://t.co/toZuWe9czj

How to participate:

→ Go to https://t.co/vGHIIZALtG
→ Connect your Solana wallet
→ Head to The Lab and submit a peptide sequence
→ Go to the Feed and annotate discoveries from other researchers
→ Watch your score and estimated rewards update in real time

$PEPTM · Solana · Open DeSci · Season 1
